title: bridge-zephyr nRF52840 build lacks lora0 devicetree alias
description: After fixing the LICHEN Zephyr module bridge subdirectory path, west build -p always -b nrf52840dk/nrf52840 firmware/bridge-zephyr -d build_bridge_i81y20_nrf_path_check passes CMake configure and then fails compiling firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c because DT_ALIAS(lora0) is missing. Add an appropriate board overlay/alias for supported LoRa hardware or gate CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2 on boards without lora0.
close_reason: Fixed: generic nRF52840 DK no longer enables LoRa L2 without a lora0 alias; supported LoRa board configs explicitly enable CONFIG_LORA; requested west build passes.
